openPopupOnDuplicateDetected.message: 检测到重复标签页时打开弹出面板
openPopupOnDuplicateDetected.description: Open popup panel when a new duplicate tab is detected

priorityAndExclusions.description: Section title for tab priority and exclusion rules (whitelist, skip blank)

keepReloadOlderTab.message: 保留并刷新旧的标签页

keeptabwithHttps.message: 保留 HTTPS 的标签页

ignoreHashPart.message: 忽略标签页 URL 中的井字部分

ignoreSearchPart.message: 忽略标签页 URL 中的问号部分

ignorePathPart.message: 忽略标签页 URL 中的路径部分（仅域名）
ignorePathPart.description: Ignore path part in URL - matches all pages on the same domain

ignore3w.message: 忽略 URL 域名中的 'www'

caseInsensitive.message: 忽略 URL 中的大小写

titleSimilarityThreshold.description: Minimum title similarity to consider tabs as duplicates

prioritizeActiveWindow.message: 优先活动窗口（仅适用于所有窗口范围）
prioritizeActiveWindow.description: Keep the tab in the focused window when duplicates span multiple windows

skipBlankTabs.message: 跳过空白标签页（about:blank，新标签页）
skipBlankTabs.description: Completely ignore blank and new tab pages from duplicate detection

closeAllDuplicateTabs.description: Close all duplicate tabs (keeps one per group)

groupDuplicateTabs.description: Toggle grouped view of duplicate tabs in the popup

groupDuplicateTabsTooltip.description: Tooltip for the group duplicate tabs button

closeGroup.description: Close all duplicate tabs in a group

tabsCount.description: Badge showing how many tabs are in a group

monitoringPaused.description: Shown in the duplicate tabs list when monitoring is paused

whitelistedTab.message: 已加入白名单 - 不会自动关闭
whitelistedTab.description: Tooltip shown on duplicate tabs that match the whitelist

hideWhitelistedTooltip.message: 从列表中隐藏白名单标签页
hideWhitelistedTooltip.description: Tooltip for the hide-whitelisted eye icon checkbox in the tab list footer

toggleOptionsPanelTooltip.description: Tooltip for the button that shows/hides the options column in two-column mode

advanced.description: Divider label above advanced sections (Theme, Popup, Badge)

popupSection.description: Section title for popup behavior options

badgeSection.description: Section title for badge color and display options

badgeColorDuplicateTabs.message: 有重复标签页时数字背景色

badgeColorNoDuplicateTabs.message: 无重复标签页时数字背景色
badgeColorNoDuplicateTabs.description: Badge color for no duplicate tabs

showBadgeIfNoDuplicateTabs.message: 无重复标签页时显示角标
showBadgeIfNoDuplicateTabs.description: Show badge if no duplicate tabs

closePopup.message: 关闭重复标签页后自动关闭弹出面板
closePopup.description: Close popup panel after closing duplicate tabs

shrunkMode.message:
精简模式：
启用时，隐藏未固定的选项。
shrunkMode.description:
Shrunk mode
When activated, hide unpinned options.

whiteListHint.message: 使用 * 作为通配符，或用 /.../ 包裹正则表达式，例如: /^(?!.*google\.com)/
whiteListHint.description: Hint below the whitelist textarea showing pattern syntax examples
